items.name_en: Chanel 24k hobo
items.name_cn:
Chanel 24k hobo
Size: 17*24*5cm Grey (Photo lighting may cause color difference)
New 24k shoulder bag, really love it, a Liu Wen style
Compared to the chunky gold chain from last season or the metal chain, this one is the closest to perfection
The difference is the top trim is now a CC logo, looks super good
Love the capacity, it's the perfect size
Gives off a lazy yet refined vibe, highly recommended
Model No. AS5177

items.name_en: Chanel 24K Popcorn Popcorn🍿️
items.name_cn:
Chanel 24K Popcorn Popcorn🍿️
Size: 16*11*7cm
The 24K expensive Popcorn evening bag, is there any beauty who wants to own it? Fashion item, stylish item, showcasing personality charm Popcorn bucket Chanel, 24K Popcorn bucket, this is likely another player's item, probably another six-figure item. To be honest, compared to the previous guitar and tea box, I get the Popcorn bucket more, the pearl popcorn is quite unique (exquisite). What do you all think? 24K Chanel, exclusive online POP COCO Popcorn, I love this so much

items.name_en: Chanel 24B Velvet Shell Bag in stock | Large batch photos
items.name_cn:
Chanel 24B Velvet Shell Bag in stock | Large batch photos
🖤This season's little dark horse🖤 No girl would refuse this bag, unless she hasn't fallen in love with it enough yet❗️❗️ It really has great texture. I absolutely adore it at first sight. In my eyes, it is both fashionable and cute. I really can't praise it enough✌️✌️ The actual product is just incredibly, incredibly, incredibly, incredibly good-looking. It looks perfect from every angle💕💕 The shine is just right. This small bag is exquisite whether carried by hand or worn crossbody or on the shoulder, while full of vintage vibes🫶🫶 Go for it! Besties, buy it now❗️❗️❗️❗️
Size: 15*20*6cm
Model: AS5130
